name: Shrimp Rumaki
recipeIngredient: 1 can (8 oz.) whole water chestnuts, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the sherry, soy sauce, and lemon juice. Add the shrimp and water chestnuts; toss to coat. Cover; refrigerate 2 to 4 hours.
2. Preheat the oven to 450°F. Cook the bacon in a skillet until it is golden brown but not crisp; drain on paper towels.
3. Drain the shrimp and water chestnuts, discarding the marinade. To prepare each appetizer, wrap one bacon slice around one shrimp and one water chestnut; secure with a toothpick. Place in an ungreased 15x10x1 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 450°F for 8-10 minutes or until the bacon is crisp and the shrimp turn pink, turning once. Makes 20 appetizers.
